---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest an idea for a new AI Agent Skill
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement, skill-request
assignees: humaisali
---

**Is your skill request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when my agent writes bad CSS...

**Describe the skill you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the instructions, frameworks, or domain knowledge you want packaged into a skill. 
(e.g., "I would like a skill focused purely on Tailwind CSS v4 best practices.")

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Are there existing skills in this repository that almost do what you want, but not quite?

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. (Links to official documentation are very helpful!)
